response.justification: Despite extensive full-stack and cross-platform experience, the candidate shows minimal direct C++ experience beyond a brief role at National Instruments 10 years ago, with no evidence of modern C++/STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, or industrial automation systems — all core requirements for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack and systems engineering background across diverse platforms
Proven experience with event-driven architectures and open-source contributions
Excellent documentation, teaching, and agile collaboration skills
concerns: Lacks recent or substantial C++ development experience required for core responsibilities
No demonstrated exposure to industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or IoT protocols
Primary tech stack is JavaScript/TypeScript/DLang, not aligned with C++-centric role
